title: H2: cells add/update advisory lint for the release-manifest trap
action: Per H2 (CONTEXT.md): in handleCellsAdd (templates/bee.mjs:590) and handleCellsUpdate, after a successful write, emit a loud advisory WARNING line (append to the returned result text -> stdout at bee.mjs:2681, or stderr like :2688 — there is no exact WARNING precedent, so pick one and keep the tone consistent; NEVER change the exit code, NEVER refuse; handleCellsUpdate's merged cell from updateCell carries verify/files even when the patch omits them — lint the MERGED cell) when any written cell's verify string contains 'release_manifest' while its files array lacks 'docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/release-manifest.json'. Message names the trap (cold worker hits red verify with no sanctioned fix) and the fix (add the manifest to files; regen only via release_manifest.mjs --write). Tolerate malformed shapes (missing verify/files, non-string verify) silently — the lint never throws. Byte-mirror .bee/bin/bee.mjs. Rows in test_bee_cli.mjs: warning fires on the trap shape (add AND update paths); silent when the manifest is listed; silent when verify does not mention release_manifest; malformed shapes no-throw; the write itself always succeeds. Mirrors synced. FINAL STEP: node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, then the cell verify.

truths: warning fires exactly on the trap shape for both add and update
write never blocked, exit code unchanged
artifacts: fresh verify output with the new rows green
prohibitions: no edits outside bounded files (manifest via --write only)

trace.outcome: H2 advisory manifest lint: cells add/update now emit a stderr WARNING (never a refusal, never an exit-code change) when a written/merged cell's verify mentions release_manifest but files omits docs/history/codex-harness-hardening/release-manifest.json. Lints the MERGED cell on update. Byte-mirrored to .bee/bin/bee.mjs, tests mirrored to .claude/.agents. Manifest regenerated via --write.
trace.verify_output: 168 passed, 0 failed (test_bee_cli.mjs incl. 4 manifestLintWarning unit tests + 5 through-the-dispatcher add/update WARNING rows); test_lib_mirror: templates/lib and .bee/bin/lib byte-identical (19 files), hook inventory byte-identical (10 files); release_manifest --check: 146 file(s) match stored manifest.
